metadata.title:
Assessor Stewart States His Contentious
IFS to Liability of Local Vews Fran
chise to Pay Just Share of Taxes Is
Upheld--Rdilrodd Ddludtions Greatly
Increased.

pages.raw_text:
According to the schedule of the
tax commission timber lands are
to be increased to such an extent
that the total revenue in all coun-
ties of the state will be advanced
from 10 to IL millions.


With reference to assessments Of
telephone, telegraph, electric light.
water and gas companies, the sew
eral assessors arc expected as soon
as possible to estimate valuations
for the several counties and turn
in the figures TO the tax commits
sion. Such reports will then be
collated and from the aggregate
will be produced a fixed plan for
assessment of those properties
named which will be forwarded
back to the several assessors as
general scheme for the taxation of
the utilities mentioned.


Regarding the assessment of
railroad properties, the action TAX
en- at Olympia presages heavier
